original: His vicious snout - combined with his tense, hulking frame - displays a savage visage, contrasting greatly with your otherwise calm surroundings. Armed with his massive hammer and heavy railgun in each hand, he looks ready to fight a small army all by himself. The cold air steams off of his sweltering body, gusts of air from above occasionally whipping and thrashing the misty streams like tattered cloth.\n\nHis azure eyes are filled with an intense fire.
